violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a plastic soda crate and large package of toilet paper. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as buns) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. English Food Labeling for Packaged Food New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

Single service items observed stored on the floor in the front service area. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the fryers, and the area beneath the flattop grills have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Ansul pipes below the hood have an accumulation of grease and oil. Freezers and chest freezers have an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. One 5 gallon bucket observed filled with waste oil, and another 5 gallon bucket observed tipped on its side. Dumpster area must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The floor in the front service area is in poor repair, with an area sinking and exposing wood sub-flooring, impacting its ability to be cleaned. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs and hamburgers) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as bread) refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

The oil recycle receptacle outside is located on dirt/gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024

Burgers are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. ( ) are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024
Food observed stored on the floor in areas of the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener have an accumulation of old food debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

The oil recycle receptacle outside is located on dirt/gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
One light beneath the hood was nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024

Employee observed coming in to work and putting on gloves without washing their hands. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was taken to be cleaned and sanitized before use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

Burgers are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
A bug zapper observed in the cooking area above the chest freezer. Bug zapper was removed from the premises. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
Tahini observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
Single-use items are being used for food prep and storage. Single-use items shall not be reused. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener have an accumulation of dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

The oil recycling bin outside is located on dirt/gravel. The oil recycling bin must be cleaned or replaced. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The refuse area has an accumulation of leaf litter, debris, and grease.The refuse area must be maintained clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The 3 bay sink is in poor repair, dripping into a container. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by lids covering the basin. The hand-washing sink in the kitchen had deli paper and wrap in it. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Burgers are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

Working containers (spray bottles) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the front area cold hold refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2024

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Items were relocated to the kitchen refrigerator, and information on labeling given to PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024
Food observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the front service area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Single service items observed stored on the floor beneath the hand sink in the front service area, and on the floor in the kitchen.Single service items must be stored in a clean, dry location; where they are not subject to dust, splash, or other contamination, and at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024
Single-use items are being reused for food preparation and storage.Single-use items shall not be reused. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:window ledge in kitchen near doorrefrigeratorarea beneath the flattop grills.The chest freezers have an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

The oil recycling bin outside is located on dirt/gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The refuse area has an accumulation of leaf litter, debris, and grease.The area must be maintained clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The grease recycling bin has an accumulation of grease and debris.The grease recycling bin must be cleaned or replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The 3 bay sink is in poor repair, dripping into a container. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023
Both kitchen handwashing sinks were blocked by lids and foil. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023

Sauces were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Sauces were datemarked during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023

Single service items were observed stored on the floor. Various beverages were observed stored on the floor. Food, beverages, and single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023

Back door area by refuse was observed with an excess of leaf litter and soda crates. Grease disposal unit was observed with soil residue on exterior of container. Areas for refuse, returnables, and recyclables must be maintained clean and free of litter in order to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2023
The ceiling in the service line and prep area are covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

Wall near service line hand sink was observed with tape cardboard. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023
